results.rendered_html:
anu-√pat to pass by (acc.) flying,  ĀśvGṛ. ;
to fly after, run after, go after, follow :
Caus. (Imper. 2. sg. -pātaya) to fly along,  AV. vi, 134, 3 ;
to throw (a person) down together with oneself,  R.

results.rendered_html:
anupat 1 P.
1 To fly to or towards.
2 To fly or run after, follow (fig. also); pursue, chase; muhuranupatati syaṃdane dattadṛṣṭiḥ  Ś. 1. 7 ; kathamanupatata eva me prayatnaprekṣaṇīyaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ  Ś. 1. ; na yatra pratyāśāmanupatati no vā rahayati (cetaḥ)  Māl. 9. 8  does not run after (cherish)
(pb) hope or leave it; yasyaivaṃ bhavaṃtaḥ kuṭuṃbavṛttimanupatitāḥ  Mv. 1 ;  Śi. 11. 40. 
3 To fall upon, attack; prāgvīrānanupatya  Māl. 8. 9. 
— Caus.
1 To fly to.
2 To throw another down along with oneself.
